item.title: First reading, referred to Law & Justice.

item.title: ❓💵Timothy Grisham - WASHINGTON ASSOCIATION OF COUNTY OFFICIALS
item.description: Timothy Grisham signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WASHINGTON ASSOCIATION OF COUNTY OFFICIALS. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Catherine Cornwall - King County Superior Court Clerk
item.description: Catherine Cornwall signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent King County Superior Court Clerk.

item.description: Heather Hirotaka signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Office of the Secretary of State.

item.description: Michael Shaw signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of County Auditors. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: James McMahan signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WA Assoc Sheriffs & Police Chiefs.
